---
title: "07: Conditionals (Solutions)"
author: "Charlie Lindgren"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Solutions

```{r, eval=TRUE, echo=TRUE}
# Solution to Exercise 1
number <- 5
if (number > 0) {
  print("The number is positive")
} else {
  print("The number is not positive")
}

# Solution to Exercise 2
age <- 20
if (age >= 18) {
  print("You are eligible to vote")
} else {
  print("You are not eligible to vote")
}

# Solution to Exercise 3
check_grade <- function(grade) {
  if (grade >= 50) {
    return("Pass")
  } else {
    return("Fail")
  }
}
check_grade(75)
check_grade(45)

# Solution to Exercise 4
is_even_odd <- function(num) {
  if (num %% 2 == 0) {
    print("Even")
  } else {
    print("Odd")
  }
}
is_even_odd(4)
is_even_odd(7)

# Solution to Exercise 5
check_sign <- function(num) {
  if (num > 0) {
    print("Positive")
  } else if (num < 0) {
    print("Negative")
  } else {
    print("Zero")
  }
}
check_sign(10)
check_sign(-5)
check_sign(0)

# Solution to Exercise 6
is_empty_string <- function(str) {
  if (nchar(str) == 0) {
    print("String is empty")
  } else {
    print("String is not empty")
  }
}
is_empty_string("")
is_empty_string("hello")

# Solution to Exercise 7
check_element_in_vector <- function(element, vector) {
  if (element %in% vector) {
    print("Element is present")
  } else {
    print("Element is not present")
  }
}
check_element_in_vector(3, c(1, 2, 3, 4))
check_element_in_vector(5, c(1, 2, 3, 4))

# Solution to Exercise 8
is_between <- function(num, lower, upper) {
  if (num > lower && num < upper) {
    print("Number is between the limits")
  } else {
    print("Number is not between the limits")
  }
}
is_between(5, 1, 10)
is_between(15, 1, 10)

# Solution to Exercise 9
is_leap_year <- function(year) {
  if ((year %% 4 == 0 && year %% 100 != 0) || (year %% 400 == 0)) {
    print("Leap Year")
  } else {
    print("Not a Leap Year")
  }
}
is_leap_year(2000)
is_leap_year(1900)
is_leap_year(2024)

# Solution to Exercise 10
is_prime <- function(num) {
  if (num <= 1) {
    print("Not a prime number")
    return()
  }
  for (i in 2:(num - 1)) {
    if (num %% i == 0) {
      print("Not a prime number")
      return()
    }
  }
  print("Prime number")
}
is_prime(7)
is_prime(10)

# Solution to Exercise 11
assign_grade <- function(score) {
  if (score >= 90) {
    print("A")
  } else if (score >= 80) {
    print("B")
  } else if (score >= 70) {
    print("C")
  } else if (score >= 60) {
    print("D")
  } else {
    print("F")
  }
}
assign_grade(95)
assign_grade(72)

# Solution to Exercise 12
is_perfect_square <- function(num) {
  if (num < 0) {
    print("Not a perfect square")
    return()
  }
  sqrt_num <- sqrt(num)
  if (sqrt_num == floor(sqrt_num)) {
    print("Perfect Square")
  } else {
    print("Not a Perfect Square")
  }
}
is_perfect_square(9)
is_perfect_square(10)

# Solution to Exercise 13
is_palindrome <- function(num) {
  num_str <- as.character(num)
  reversed_str <- paste(rev(strsplit(num_str, "")[[1]]), collapse = "")
  if (num_str == reversed_str) {
    print("Palindrome")
  } else {
    print("Not a Palindrome")
  }
}
is_palindrome(121)
is_palindrome(123)
```
